prompt: Create a high-contrast monochrome glamour portrait of an adult East Asian woman seated in a black leather armchair against a deep black studio background. She has a short sleek black bob haircut, pale smooth skin, large expressive eyes, and a calm direct gaze toward the camera. Use selective color so the entire image is black and white except for vivid red lipstick. She wears a wide-brim light-colored felt hat, a loose oversized white button-down shirt styled as a casual mini shirt-dress with an open neckline, a delicate pendant necklace, and a slim bracelet. Pose her sitting forward with both knees together, one arm resting on the chair arm, and the other hand lightly touching the brim of the hat. Frame as a vertical three-quarter seated portrait from head to knees, with soft studio lighting, bright highlights on the face and clothing, subtle leather reflections, smooth skin retouching, elegant fashion photography mood, shallow depth of field, and no text or watermark.
promptEn: Create a high-contrast monochrome glamour portrait of an adult East Asian woman seated in a black leather armchair against a deep black studio background. She has a short sleek black bob haircut, pale smooth skin, large expressive eyes, and a calm direct gaze toward the camera. Use selective color so the entire image is black and white except for vivid red lipstick. She wears a wide-brim light-colored felt hat, a loose oversized white button-down shirt styled as a casual mini shirt-dress with an open neckline, a delicate pendant necklace, and a slim bracelet. Pose her sitting forward with both knees together, one arm resting on the chair arm, and the other hand lightly touching the brim of the hat. Frame as a vertical three-quarter seated portrait from head to knees, with soft studio lighting, bright highlights on the face and clothing, subtle leather reflections, smooth skin retouching, elegant fashion photography mood, shallow depth of field, and no text or watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张高对比度的黑白魅力肖像，主体为一名 东亚女性，她坐在一张黑色皮质扶手椅上，背景为深邃的黑色影棚背景。她留着利落的黑色短波波头，皮肤白皙光滑，双眸深邃传神，神情平静地直视镜头。采用局部色彩处理，整张图片呈黑白效果，唯有 红色 唇膏部分保留鲜艳色彩。她戴着一顶浅色宽檐毡帽，身穿一件宽松的 白色 衬衫，设计为休闲衬衫裙风格，领口微敞，搭配精致的吊坠项链和纤细手链。姿势设定为身体前倾，双膝并拢，一只手臂搭在椅扶手上，另一只手轻触帽檐。构图采用竖向七分身坐姿肖像，从头部到膝盖，配合柔和的影棚布光，面部和衣物呈现明亮的高光，带有细腻的皮革反光，皮肤质感平滑，营造出优雅的时尚摄影氛围，景深较浅，画面中无文字或水印。
